══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kalashtar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kalashtar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 21 damage. Kalashtar — Armored Tank HP: 38/59
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Kalashtar — Armored Tank HP: 19/59
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Kalashtar — Armored Tank HP: 1/59
--- Kalashtar — Armored Tank --- HP: 1/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kalashtar — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kalashtar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kalashtar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Kalashtar — Armored Tank --- HP: 1/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 170/178
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 170/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kalashtar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kalashtar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Kalashtar — Armored Tank HP: -16/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):19+4=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
